_doc: Offline / fake config for the arch-drift example. Runs end-to-end with no API key and no mmdc install. The provider NAMED `claude` is wired here to a fake_scripted backend, so the pipeline's `model: "claude:claude-sonnet-4-6"` resolves to a canned reply. The mermaid renderer returns a canned SVG when MERMAID_RENDERER=:canned (see README). For the real-model run, use arch-drift.real.json.

claude-sonnet-4-6: {"mermaid":"flowchart LR\n  core --> harness\n  harness --> adapters","notes":"3-layer split: core defines the message shape, harness orchestrates, adapters bind to outside systems."}
